surfaces.name: Lium Backend API OpenAPI schema
surfaces.notes: Public machine-readable OpenAPI 3.1.0 document for the Lium Backend API (title "Lium Backend API", version 1.0.0) powering the SN51 lium.io GPU-compute marketplace. Fetched 200 with a real paths object (e.g. GET /machines, /executors, /volumes, /version). No auth required to retrieve the schema.

surfaces.name: Lium machines API
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /api/machines on lium.io returning a JSON array of available GPU machine types with live pricing and utilization (name, price, rental_rate, total_gpu_count, per-epoch cost estimates) for the SN51 lium.io compute marketplace. Verified 200 application/json.

surfaces.name: Lium API version health
surfaces.notes: Public no-auth GET /version on the Lium Backend API (served at /api/version) returning liveness JSON with started_at and uptime_seconds. Documented as GET /version in the registered OpenAPI spec on the same host as the existing machines subnet-api surface.
